notes: CRITICAL: fixes cameras with audio stripping (video_only) never coming online. v1.13.0 added an ffmpeg flag (-rw_timeout) that the bundled RTSP demuxer does not support, so those cameras' relays exited immediately on startup and a site ran at 59 of 153 cameras online. The relay now uses portable flags only; stalled relays remain covered by the health worker. Install this as soon as possible.
